message:
Context at {percentage}% ({remaining}% remaining) — FINAL MEMORY UPDATE. Compaction may happen soon.

Your session ID is: {session_id}

Find your session log (.claude/memory/session-*/session-*.md — the file with session_id: {session_id} in its frontmatter). Update it in place — edit existing sections to reflect current state, do not append. Update context_at_log to {percentage}%. Make Next Steps highly specific — exact file paths, function names, what state things are in. Write as if handing off to someone who has never seen this session.

Then inform the user that context is at {percentage}% and suggest /compact when convenient.
